name: 白蓮花養女×被替代親女
name_en: White Lotus Adopted Daughter × Replaced Biological Daughter
description: 經典的「鳩佔鵲巢」衝突——養女搶走了親女的一切（家庭地位、未婚夫、健康），衝突的核心在於不公正的偏愛和資源掠奪。每一次對比都加深觀眾的不平感。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: She likes long hair, so you cut mine off and gave it to her. She sneaked into my room at midnight and stuck needles into my arm. ... And then she burned one of her fingers. You didn't even ask for my consent, but just anesthetized me and took my skin for her graft.
examples.context: 經典的「鳩佔鵲巢」衝突——養女搶走了親女的一切（家庭地位、未婚夫、健康），衝突的核心在於不公正的偏愛和資源掠奪。每一次對比都加深觀眾的不平感。
